code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_CouponSystem] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {Retail_OrderManagement] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {Retail_Inventory] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {Retail_Inventory] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [Retail_Inventory]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {Retail_PointOfSale] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {Retail_OrderManagement] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {Retail_CouponSystem] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [Retail_Inventory]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {Retail_PointOfSale] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [Retail_Inventory]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {Retail_CustomerLoyalty] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (Retail_OrderManagement)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个宠物洗衣机的完整状态机，核心流程是：宠物创建后进入Idle，点击开始洗涤后进入Washing状态，洗涤完成到WashComplete，然后烘干、折叠，最后CycleComplete回到Idle。
明白了，Idle是初始状态。Washing和Drying这两个复合状态内部都需要计时器逻辑吗？我看您提到TimerRunning和CalculateRemaining这类操作。
对，Washing内部要有TimerRunning状态，每0.5秒计算一次剩余时间CalculateRemaining。如果remaining大于0就回到TimerRunning，小于等于0就进入TimerComplete。
那我设计TimerRunning内部再嵌套一个子状态：SaveState保存到UserDefaults，包括endTime、type为.wash、还有petID，然后UpdateUI，形成循环。这样合适吗？
可以，TimerComplete那边要有CancelTimer、ClearState、SendNotification，最后回到Inventory。Drying的逻辑和Washing对称，但是type要改成.dry。
好的，Washing和Drying的复合结构我都画好了。现在Washing通过Timer Expires事件转到WashComplete，然后Start Dry Button进入Drying。Drying结束到DryComplete，再Ready to Fold State进入Folding。
Folding之后用户点击完成，进入CycleComplete。这个状态很关键，要更新宠物健康值到100，状态变成.happy，记录lastLaundryDate，cyclesCompleted加1，还要更新streak。
CycleComplete内部的流程我理一下：UpdatePetHealth → UpdateStats → ClearNotifications → SaveDatabase → 回到OrderManagement。然后整个CycleComplete通过Return to Idle回到Idle状态，对吗？
没错。但还有个重要场景：App重新打开时的恢复机制。Washing和Drying都要能响应App Reopened事件，进入RecoveryCheck状态。
RecoveryCheck我设计成：LoadUserDefaults → ValidateState → CalculateActualRemaining → Inventory。ValidateState要检查endTime是否存在、是否合理、不能太远未来也不能太远过去。
对，CalculateActualRemaining之后要分支：如果计时器还在跑就回到Washing或Drying，如果已经过期就到WashComplete或DryComplete，数据损坏就回到Idle。
RecoveryCheck的四个分支我都连好了。现在还需要HealthDecay机制吧？Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete在Time Passes时都要进入HealthDecay。
是的，HealthDecay内部：CheckLastLaundry → CalculateHealth → UpdateState。CalculateHealth要根据距离上次洗衣的天数计算健康值，100-75%是Happy，75-50% Neutral，50-25% Sad，25-1% Very Sad，0%就进入Dead状态。
健康值计算公式是100乘以什么？您刚才说daysSince除以cycleFrequencyDays？
不对，应该是100乘以（1 - daysSince / cycleFrequencyDays），这样天数越多健康值越低。UpdateState之后回到Idle，但如果health降到0就进入Dead，宠物死亡。
明白了，HealthDecay有两个出口：Health Updated回Idle，Health = 0进Dead。Dead最终回到CustomerLoyalty。
最后加几个注释说明：Idle状态标注没有活跃计时器、可以开始洗涤、健康随时间衰减；WashComplete标注已发送通知、可以开始烘干、宠物在等待；DryComplete标注已发送通知、准备折叠、点击完成。
三个注释都加好了。我检查一下整体结构：初始状态Idle，Pet Created事件进入；Washing和Drying都有完整的TimerRunning子状态机；RecoveryCheck处理App重启恢复；HealthDecay处理健康衰减机制。看起来完整了。
TimerRunning和TimerRunning2里面的SaveState和SaveState2，UserDefaults的内容确认一下：SaveState是type: .wash，SaveState2是type: .dry，其他endTime和petID都一样对吧？
确认，SaveState存的是wash类型，SaveState2存的是dry类型，都有endTime和petID。CycleComplete里面的UpdatePetHealth注释我也写清楚了：health=100, state=.happy, lastLaundryDate=now, cyclesCompleted+=1, streak updated。
很好，整个状态机覆盖了正常流程、异常恢复、健康衰减和死亡机制。可以定稿了。
